inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that label the input.

inputs.name: alignContent
inputs.description: Indicated the direction in which the Toolbar items will be aligned.

inputs.name: overflowButtonAccessibleName
inputs.description:
Defines the accessible ARIA name of the overflow button of the component.

*Note:** When not set, the built-in translation for "Additional Options" is used.
